description: modules/nebula/helpers.nix duplicates hostname resolution logic between sshHost (lines 14-24) and sshMuxAlias (lines 58-65). Both compute remoteHasTailscale, machineHasTailscale, useSharedDomain, sharedHostname, and hostAlias identically. Extract into a shared resolveHostname helper. Also create a hasFeature helper to replace repeated builtins.elem patterns.
title: Deduplicate hostname resolution logic in nebula helpers
